steps: Contact Nordea Custody to report the under-withholding of Finnish tax on Nokia Oyj dividend (withheld 13.5% instead of required 15%)
Calculate and remit the additional EUR 3,607.50 tax owed to Finnish tax authority Vero for the FI-NO treaty shortfall
Submit corrected withholding tax payment to Vero with reference to Nokia dividend payment and CLIENT04 account 2901234567
Obtain confirmation from Vero of the additional tax payment to resolve the treaty compliance discrepancy

references.title: Vero – Payments of Dividends to Nonresidents
